issue_name: Unused local variables should be removed
Mergeable if statements should be combined
Exception handlers should preserve original exceptions
Nested blocks of code should not be left empty
Unused function parameters should be removed
Generic exceptions should never be raised
Regular expressions should not always fail
Functions and methods should not be empty
Regular expressions should not be too complicated
All branches in a conditional structure should not have exactly the same implementation
Identical expressions should not be used on both sides of a binary operator
Cryptographic hashes should not be vulnerable
Regular expressions should not be vulnerable to denial of service attacks
Cognitive Complexity of functions should not be too high
Assertions should not test for truthiness of tuples
Methods should not have identical implementations
Regular expression alternatives should not be redundant
Regular expressions should not lead to stack overflow
Comparison to self should not be made
